pages.title: make.com/en
pages.content:
# make.com/en

> Make is a leading visual automation tool for AI and agentic workflows. Make's platform enables users to connect different apps and services, automate tasks, create AI workflows, build AI agents, use model context protocol (MCP) and real time data processing into workflows. Make platform now supports over 3,000 pre-built apps and allows customers to integrate anything with an API. Make platform offers agentic automation, a next-gen approach that enables AI-driven agents to autonomously handle complex tasks, adapting in real time to changing conditions.

## AI, AI Agents and agentic automation
- [AI Automation](https://www.make.com/en/ai-automation): Make offers an AI automation platform that integrates AI directly into your workflows. It uses drag-and-drop tools and AI Agents to automate tasks, build intelligent AI workflows, and adapt to changing conditions in real time, informing decision-making.
- [Make AI Agents](https://www.make.com/en/ai-agents): Make lets you build, customize, and manage intelligent AI agents that automate your business processes, adapt in real-time, and reduce complexity. Make AI Agents understand goals in natural language and adjust workflows dynamically.
- [Agentic automation](https://www.make.com/en/agentic-automation): Make's agentic automation provides businesses with goal-oriented systems that independently handle complex, ever-changing tasks to improve efficiency and stay competitive. These adaptable workflows react to new information as it happens and can expand with your business, offering greater flexibility and freeing up valuable resources by overseeing routine processes.

## What is Make
- [Automation tool and visual integration platform](https://www.make.com/en/product): A comprehensive guide to the Make no-code platform. Learn to build advanced automation workflows and scenarios, integrating apps like Google Sheets, Notion, and OpenAI.
- [Sign up and start automating](https://www.make.com/en/register): This guide introduces the Make AI Agent, a powerful tool for no-code automation. Learn to create scenarios that leverage AI for complex, autonomous workflows and integrations.
- [Pricing & Subscription Packages](https://www.make.com/en/pricing): A guide to Make’s pricing and subscription plans. Find the perfect no-code automation plan that scales with you, from your first scenario to powering your entire business.
- [Careers](https://www.make.com/en/careers): Careers guide: Join our team of Makers at Make, the visual automation platform. Explore open positions, company culture, and our mission to empower people to build and innovate without limits.
- [About Make](https://www.make.com/en/about): Explore Make in this guide to our visual automation platform. Build custom no-code scenarios, integrate hundreds of apps and services, and automate workflows to realize your business's full potential.
- [Become A Partner](https://www.make.com/en/partners): This is a guide to joining the Make Partner Program. Learn how to leverage our no-code platform to build custom automation workflows and deliver powerful solutions for your customers.
- [Enterprise Automation](https://www.make.com/en/enterprise): Explore the Make Enterprise partnership program. A guide for businesses seeking to scale with our no-code automation platform, build custom solutions, and create powerful, integrated workflows.
- [Become a Make Affiliate](https://www.make.com/en/affiliate): Guide to the Make referral program. Learn how to partner with us and earn commissions by sharing our no-code automation platform and empowering users to build powerful workflows.
- [Make Grid](https://www.make.com/en/grid): This guide introduces Make Grid, a feature that provides a visual map of your entire automation and AI landscape. Learn how it helps you observe, manage, and scale your scenarios.
- [Automation Security](https://www.make.com/en/security): Guide to automation security on the Make platform. Learn about our commitment to the highest compliance standards and data protection to keep your scenarios and workflows secure.
- [Automation Conference Waves 2025](https://www.make.com/en/waves): A guide to Waves '25, Make's premier event in Munich. Learn about key sessions on AI and automation, major product updates, and how you can join us for hands-on learning and networking.
- [What’s New at Make](https://www.make.com/en/whats-new): Get the latest news from Make. This guide covers recent platform updates, new app integrations, and feature improvements for building more powerful workflows and scenarios.
- [Press releases and Company News](https://www.make.com/en/press): Your official source for Make news and press releases. Discover our latest product announcements, like Make Grid and AI Agents, company milestones, and automation platform updates.
- [Make Bridge: Pre-built Integrations](https://www.make.com/en/bridge): Guide to Make Bridge: Learn to enrich your product by embedding pre-built integrations and custom automation scenarios. Build powerful workflows directly into your app using our no-code API.
- [Integromat evolves to Make](https://www.make.com/en/integromat-evolves-to-make): This guide covers the evolution of Integromat to Make. Discover our new no-code automation platform, brand identity, and vision to empower everyone to create powerful workflows without limits.

## Automate business functions
- [Customer Experience Automation (CXA)](https://www.make.com/en/solutions/automate-customer-experience): A guide on Customer Experience Automation CXA. Learn how to use Make's no-code platform to automate and integrate your CX workflows, including onboarding, education, and support ticket management. Create seamless customer journeys with powerful scenarios.
- [Automate Finance Workflows](https://www.make.com/en/solutions/automate-finance): A guide to automating finance workflows with Make. Learn how to use our visual platform to build no-code workflows for payroll, invoicing, billing, and expense management by integrating your apps.
- [Automate HR processes](https://www.make.com/en/solutions/automate-hr): This guide shows you how to use Make to automate HR workflows. Learn to connect your apps to streamline everything from employee onboarding and time tracking to offboarding with no-code automation.
- [Automate IT](https://www.make.com/en/solutions/automate-it): Explore IT automation with Make. This guide shows you how to build no-code scenarios to connect your tools for system monitoring, user management, and more.
- [Marketing Automation Software](https://www.make.com/en/solutions/automate-marketing): A guide to marketing automation with Make. Learn how to build powerful, no-code workflows to connect your marketing tools, manage leads, and launch campaigns without writing a single line of code.
- [Automate Operations](https://www.make.com/en/solutions/automate-operations): A guide to automating business operations with Make. Discover how to create powerful scenarios to connect your tools, streamline workflows, and improve efficiency. Master no-code automation and transform your operational processes.
- [Automate Productivity](https://www.make.com/en/solutions/automate-productivity): A guide on automating workplace productivity with Make. Learn how our no-code platform helps you build custom workflows to connect your apps for project, task, and inbox management.
- [Automate Sales](https://www.make.com/en/solutions/automate-sales): This guide shows how to automate sales processes with Make. Integrate your CRM and other apps to build no-code scenarios for prospecting, outreach, and lead processing.

## Automate business use cases
- [Automate Hiring ](https://www.make.com/en/automate/candidate-sourcing): A guide to a powerful Make use case. Learn how to integrate your favorite apps to build a no-code scenario and create efficient, automated workflows for your business.
- [Grow Your Community With Automated Management Solutions](https://www.make.com/en/automate/community-management): A guide to building a no-code workflow in Make. Learn to create a scenario integrating OpenAI and Notion to automatically summarize your meeting notes.
- [Automate Your Content Creation](https://www.make.com/en/automate/content-creation): Tutorial: A practical Make use case. This guide shows how to build a no-code scenario to connect apps, integrate services, and automate your unique workflows.
- [Get Business Moving With Contract Automation Software](https://www.make.com/en/automate/contracting): A use case guide to automating your content workflow. Learn to build a no-code Make scenario integrating OpenAI and Google Sheets to instantly generate and log social media posts.
- [Customer Education](https://www.make.com/en/automate/customer-education): A practical guide to a powerful no-code automation use case. Learn to build a scenario in Make to connect your favorite apps and streamline your workflows.
- [Automate Your Customer Onboarding](https://www.make.com/en/automate/customer-onboarding): Explore a practical Make use case in this guide. Build a custom no-code scenario to integrate your tools, automate repetitive tasks, and create more efficient workflows.
- [Automate Data Management](https://www.make.com/en/automate/data-management): A practical use case guide for building a custom Make scenario. Learn how to connect your favorite apps, automate complex workflows, and build powerful no-code integrations.
- [Automated Expense Management](https://www.make.com/en/automate/expense-management): Guide: Automate your expense management workflows with Make. Learn to build a no-code scenario connecting apps like Google Sheets and QuickBooks to streamline approvals and reporting.
- [Automate Inventory](https://www.make.com/en/automate/inventory-management): Build an automated inventory management workflow with Make. This tutorial shows you how to create a scenario connecting Shopify and Google Sheets to sync stock levels in real-time.
- [Automate Invoicing And Billing](https://www.make.com/en/automate/invoicing): Automate your invoicing and accounting tasks with Make. This guide shows you how to build no-code scenarios connecting QuickBooks, Xero, and Stripe to streamline your financial workflows.
- [Outbound Lead Automation](https://www.make.com/en/automate/outreach): Integration guide: Automate your Outreach workflows with Make. Build custom scenarios to connect apps and eliminate repetitive tasks for a more streamlined sales process.
- [Automate Project Management](https://www.make.com/en/automate/project-management): A guide to streamlining project management with Make. Discover how to build no-code automation scenarios that connect Trello, Asana, and Jira to supercharge your team's workflow.

## Blog

- [Blog - Automation News and Updates](https://www.make.com/en/blog): The Make.com blog serves as your authoritative resource for automation platform insights. We provide valuable guidance on utilizing our automation tool to integrate applications, optimize workflows, and deploy intelligent AI workflows with AI Agents.
- [Make MCP server: Give your AI agent a toolbox](https://www.make.com/en/blog/model-context-protocol-mcp-server): This article introduces the Model Context Protocol (MCP) server from Make, explaining how it offers a no-code method to power up AI agents by integrating them with Make scenarios through a standardized protocol – without managing API endpoints, installing local code, or maintaining infrastructure.
- [What is agentic AI?](https://www.make.com/en/blog/what-is-agentic-ai): This article defines Agentic AI as systems capable of perceiving, reasoning, acting, and learning autonomously to achieve goals with minimal human input, explaining its benefits, examples, and how Make integrates this technology.
- [MCP Client](https://www.make.com/en/blog/mcp-client): Make introduced a new MCP Client. This new module lets your Make scenarios or agents, call tools hosted outside of Make, securely and visually, without raw code, local hosting, or external infrastructure.
- [Introducing Maia by Make: Build AI & automation through conversation, transparently](https://www.make.com/en/blog/make-maia-no-code): Introduction to Maia, Make's new AI feature for building automation scenarios using natural language. Learn how this conversational tool helps you create powerful no-code integrations with full transparency.
- [Here's everything we announced at Waves '25](https://www.make.com/en/blog/waves-make-product-releases-2025): An official recap of Make's Waves '25 product announcements. Explore visual orchestration and new features designed to help you build, accelerate, and scale automation, including Maia, AI Agents, Make Grid, and Make Code.
- [The next generation of Make AI Agents: Visual, transparent, reusable](https://www.make.com/en/blog/next-generation-make-AI-agents): A guide to the next generation of Make AI Agents. This article explains how to build visual, transparent, and reusable agentic automation scenarios with new features like dynamic routing and Module Tools directly in the Scenario Builder.
- [Survey says…it's time to turn AI enthusiasm into real results](https://www.make.com/en/blog/make-ai-survey): [An analysis of our survey on AI adoption. This guide shows leaders how to turn enthusiasm into results and build agentic workflows using Make's visual, no-code automation platform.]
- [Custom logic inside Make: Meet the Make Code App](https://www.make.com/en/blog/make-code-app): Explore the Make Code App in this guide. Run native JavaScript and Python scripts inside your automation scenarios to handle complex data transformations and custom logic without external services.
- [Navigate faster, work smarter: Make’s redesigned navigation is here](https://www.make.com/en/blog/product-navigation-redesign-2025): A guide to Make's new platform navigation. Learn about the redesigned UI, updated features, and visual refresh that help you build no-code automation scenarios faster than ever.
- [Make + Vapi - a powerful combination for Conversational AI](https://www.make.com/en/blog/make-vapi-powerful-combination-for-conversational-ai): A guide to building Vapi Custom Tools for conversational AI using Make. Learn to create no-code scenarios that connect Vapi to CRMs, ERPs, and other apps via webhooks and dedicated Vapi modules.
- [Stop automating like it’s 2015: What you need to know before kicking off AI transformation](https://www.make.com/en/blog/what-to-know-before-starting-ai-transformation): A guide to AI transformation with insights from Make and FINN's CTO. Learn strategies for adopting AI at scale, fostering a culture of innovation, and evolving your automation beyond outdated methods.
- [Code or no‑code? Vibe coding enters the debate](https://www.make.com/en/blog/code-no-code-vibe-coding): This guide compares vibe coding, no-code, and code for software development. Learn how to orchestrate them with Make, using Make Grid and AI Agents to unify your automations and scale with control.
- [Preview Waves ’25: Where the bold Make it happen](https://www.make.com/en/blog/preview-waves-where-the-bold-make-it-happen): A guide to Waves '25, Make's annual AI automation conference. Discover what's next in no-code with product updates on AI agents and Make Grid, expert-led workshops, and inspiring keynotes.
- [The opportunity isn’t AI – it’s what you make with it](https://www.make.com/en/blog/make-it-happen): Discover visual orchestration, Make’s unique approach to AI and automation. This guide explores how Make AI Agents and Make Grid empower you to visualize, control, and scale your no-code scenarios.
- [](https://www.make.com/en/blog/make-it-happen): Guide to Make's no-code platform for AI automation and visual orchestration. Learn how to build intelligent scenarios, manage AI agents, and scale innovation with our visual tools.
- [Make (it) in sales: How three Make customers turned sales into growth with A

This page is also available as Markdown . GitBook Assistant Ask On this page Get started Overview Make Custom Apps documentation is a guide for developers to create apps for themselves or others to use on the Make platform. If you need to interact with a third-party application in Make and there is not an app created for it yet, you can make your own. This documentation helps you prepare to build an app, walks you through the process of creating your first app, and provides you with best practices and specifications for your project. Custom Apps Development Training If you are new to custom apps, enroll in the Make Academy course Getting started with custom apps . By the end of the course, you will understand what custom apps are and the benefits of using them, use the API documentation to help you design and create your first app, and identify the components that form a custom app. Get started Step 1: Select your editor Select the editor you want to use to build your custom app: Make web interface , Visual Studio Code . Step 2: Determine your starting point If you're already familiar with Make , you're ready to create your first app . If you're new to Make , we recommend that you begin with a practice exercise (see Step 3 ). Step 3: Practice connecting an API in Make Before creating your first app, make a test HTTP call to practice connecting to your selected API on the Make platform. This will help you get comfortable with the process. Next Select your editor Last updated 16 days ago Resources Academy Community Help Center Useful links Support Privacy Notice Status Page make.com Follow us LinkedIn X (Twitter) Facebook Instagram © 2025 make.com Get started Step 1: Select your editor Step 2: Determine your starting point Step 3: Practice connecting an API in Make
